pillar_ref: multi (8 lowest cycle-4 P0 pillars: L57, L58, L13, L62, L63, L33, L37, L26)
summary: Authors v15 plan for cycle-4 P0 fleet sweep. Selects 8 lowest-scoring pillars from cycle-4 sweep (findings/2026-06-20-71-pillar-cycle-4-summary.md) as v15 track candidates. Each track scoped to be MacBook-runnable in 1.5-6h, parallel-agent dispatchable, and lifts pillar score 1->3. Plan uses Theme/Date/Sponsor/Goal/Stretch header + Track T1-T8 sections + closing Cross-Cutting Concerns section per orchestrator's v15 plan schema.
commit_message: docs(plan): v15 cycle-4 P0 fleet sweep (8 tracks: L57+L58+L13+L62+L63+L33+L37+L26)

actions.rationale: Read cycle-4 sweep findings (5 repos: Configra, pheno-config, pheno-otel, pheno-capacity, nanovms). Identified per-domain means: Observability 1.00 (lowest), Performance 1.57, Security 1.78, DX 1.88, Docs 1.92, Quality 1.93, Governance 2.13, Architecture 2.30, UX 2.53. Org mean = 1.60.

Selected 8 pillars as v15 tracks: (1) L57 metrics RED/USE [Observability, P0 fleet-wide, lowest domain at 1.00], (2) L58 distributed tracing [Observability, P0 fleet-wide], (3) L13 latency budgets [Performance, 1.57, nanovms most acute], (4) L62 backup/restore [Ops, 4 of 5 repos], (5) L63 capacity planning [Ops, all 5 repos], (6) L33 hot reload [DX, 3 of 5 repos], (7) L37 dev container [DX, 4 of 5 repos], (8) L26 chaos testing [Quality, 4 of 5 repos]. Each pillar scored 1 in cycle-4 sweep and lifts to 3 post-v15.

Deferred to v16+: L46 IAM (4 of 5 cycle-4 repos, needs Fleet IAM framework ADR), L7 threat modeling (3 of 5 repos, needs STRIDE methodology ADR), L11.3 24h soak test (heavy-runner wave), L48 SBOM diff policy, L49 vuln response runbook, L29 empty-state design. v15 capacity is 8 tracks; deferring these preserves focus on Observability+Ops+DX+Quality closure.

Plan uses orchestrator-specified v15 schema: Theme/Date/Sponsor/Goal/Stretch header, 8 Track T<n> sections each with Goal/Why-Now/Scope/Acceptance/Effort/Risks/Depends-on/Owner, closing Cross-Cutting Concerns section. Tracks are parallel-agent dispatchable and MacBook-runnable (1.5-6h per track). Wave A runs all 8 in parallel; Wave C is cycle-5 probe + v16 plan. Estimated 6h wall time for Wave A.

Created worktree at /private/tmp/v15-plan-author-NVurDA from origin/main (commit 45067fe). New branch chore/v15-plan-authoring-2026-06-21 tracking origin/main. Worktree is ephemeral and removed after plan lands on main via single-commit PR.

track_selection_rationale.score_threshold: P0 or persistent-P1 in cycle-4 sweep
track_selection_rationale.gap_coverage: 8 tracks cover 8 distinct lowest pillars across 4 domains (Observability, Performance, Ops, DX, Quality)
track_selection_rationale.alternative_considered: Could have included L46 IAM (Security, 4 of 5) instead of L26 chaos testing (Quality, 4 of 5). Decision: chose chaos testing because (a) v13 T6 already laid the harness, (b) IAM requires Fleet IAM framework ADR not yet authored. L46 explicitly deferred to v16.

macbook_runnability.notes: T8 chaos tests are designed to run in CI weekly, not per-PR. T3 perf-gate and T5 capacity-gate are per-PR but lightweight (single-job, <2min).

prior_wave_context.v14_t7_substrate: pheno-otel::metrics skeleton (errors.count only) - foundation for v15 T1 RED/USE expansion
prior_wave_context.v14_t3_perf_template: perf-budget docs for 3 crates - template for v15 T3 nanovms + CI gate

next_wave_hooks.v15_dispatch: After this plan lands on main, orchestrator dispatches 8 parallel-agent tracks. Each track produces 1 PR on v15-T<n>-<short-desc>-2026-06-21 branch + 1 worklog JSON per track.
next_wave_hooks.v16_preview: v16 will address L46 IAM (Security) + L7 threat modeling (Security) + L48 SBOM diff policy + L49 vuln response runbook + L29 empty-state design + L11.3 24h soak test (heavy-runner wave). v16 cycle-5 sweep picks up after v15 closure.
next_wave_hooks.cycle5_probe: Runs day after v15 closure (target: 2026-06-23). Re-runs 71-pillar framework on 5 cycle-4 repos. Confirms no regressions in closed pillars + captures v15 lift.
blockers: T1 depends on pheno-otel::metrics skeleton from v14 T7 (already merged) - no blocker.
T2 depends on v12 T3 W3C trace-context test suite (already merged) - no blocker.
T3 depends on v14 T3 perf-budget template (already merged) - no blocker.
T5 depends on pheno-capacity CLI binary (already built) + L5-122 bucket-table drift resolution (already merged) - no blocker.
T8 depends on v13 T6 chaos workflow harness (already merged) - no blocker.
